meta.northy_message: Day 3 of the systems-mode trap, Steve. OpenRouter's fixed, autopilot's stable, extraction gates are being investigated — all real work, none of it closes Garland. Three calls before you open a terminal. Jodi Duron, Scale Firm, then the target clarification. $247K is sitting there.

act_now.title: Natasha renewal coverage gap
act_now.detail: Natasha stepping back for summer (re-engage October). 6+ renewals — ILTexas, Splendora, NEISD, CCISD, SEISD, BRISD — have no active owner. 53 days to Sept 1.
act_now.action: Assign Natasha's renewal portfolio to Teela or Jan TODAY.

act_now.title: Systems-mode trap day 3 — $247K unpulled lever
act_now.detail: Garland $140K + CFB $107K = $247K behind Moak Casey lever. Jodi Duron agreed in May to email Dr. Lopez. Deadline 9 days past. Today was all infrastructure — OpenRouter, autopilot, extract-facts, Execution Chain v2.
act_now.action: Three calls before you open a terminal. Jodi Duron first.

act_now.title: Revenue target contradiction — 12 days uncorrected
act_now.detail: Zig at $1.5M (Jul 6 report). Steve at $1M Sept 1. L10 at 5-10M. Zig just posted Revenue Goals doc to team — if it's framed at wrong target, every pipeline conversation is misaligned.
act_now.action: One Slack: 'Canonical target is $1M by Sept 1. Zig, align the doc.' Thirty seconds.
